mode_of_action_summary: Magnesium is a central component of chlorophyll and is essential for photosynthesis. It helps in enzyme activation and energy transfer, while sulphur supports protein synthesis. Together they improve plant growth, leaf greenness, and yield.

active_ingredients.name: Magnesium (Mg)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Essential for chlorophyll formation and photosynthesis

active_ingredients.name: Sulphur (S)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Supports protein synthesis and enzyme activity

urdu: پتے ہلکے سبز ہو جاتے ہیں
punjabi: پتے وچ زردی آ رہی اے
پتے ہلکے سبز ہو گئے نیں
roman_urdu: pattay halkay sabz ho jate hain

application_details.method: Dissolve in water and apply via foliar spray or irrigation
application_details.coverage: Ensure uniform coverage for effective absorption

farmer_benefits: پتے ہرے بھرے ہو جاندے نیں

multilingual_description.english: Magnesium sulphate fertilizer for improving chlorophyll formation and plant growth.
multilingual_description.urdu: میگنیشیم سلفیٹ کھاد جو پودے کی نشوونما اور پتوں کی سبزی بہتر بناتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: میگنیشیم سلفیٹ کھاد جو پتے ہرے بھرے کرکے پودے دی وڈھائی بہتر کردی اے۔

embedding_text: Mega Care magnesium sulphate fertilizer is used to correct magnesium deficiency improve chlorophyll formation and enhance plant growth and yield in crops.
